title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow While Using App is selected
scenario: After selecting "Allow While Using App" in the location sharing dialogue, the app should not prompt for location consent again upon restart when accessing Find My Device.
steps: Start app for first time and finish onboarding.
User lands on Home Screen and is prompted with location sharing dialogue options: 'Allow Once', 'Allow While Using App', 'Don't Allow'.
Open App Settings (hamburger icon) and tap 'Find My Device'.
FMD screen is visible with no location sharing dialogue.
Restart the app and open FMD again - user should not be asked for consent again.
expected: After restarting the app and opening FMD again, the user should not be asked for location consent again.
